REFERENCE: This is a well-known and highly cited paper in the pancreatic cancer field. It was published in Cell in December 2021 and represents a major study on the tumor microenvironment in pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma. The authors include prominent researchers from Dana-Farber Cancer Institute, Broad Institute, and MIT. All elements of the citation (authors, title, journal, DOI, PMID, PMCID) appear authentic and internally consistent. The volume, issue, and page numbers align with Cell's publication schedule for late 2021.

journal_name: Cell is a prestigious peer-reviewed journal published by Cell Press/Elsevier. It is a well-known and legitimate journal in biomedical research.
journal_volume: Volume 184 corresponds to the year 2021 for Cell journal (which publishes weekly issues). Volume 184 covers late 2021, which aligns with the publication date.
